records.question: Which customers named Cecelia with email caesar.lemke@example.net, phone 672-559-0630x7875, living at 4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103, using Direct Debit, and customer number 429 had an address starting on 2009-05-22 04:42:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'caesar.lemke@example.net' AND customers.customer_phone = '672-559-0630x7875' AND customer_address_history.date_from = '2009-05-22 04:42:28' AND customers.customer_name = 'Cecelia' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND customers.customer_address = '4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103' AND customers.customer_number = '429'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join customer_address_history on customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id join addresses on customer_address_history.address_id = addresses.address_id where lower(customers.customer_name) like '%cecelia%' and lower(customers.customer_email) like '%caesar.lemke@example.net%' and customers.customer_phone = '672-559-0630x7875' and lower(customers.payment_method_code) like '%direct debit%' and customers.customer_number = 429 and lower(addresses.line_1_number_building) like '%4065 forest vista apt. 103%' and customer_address_history.date_from = '2009-05-22 04:42:28' limit 5
records.thought: Filter customers by name, email, phone, payment method, and customer number, join with addresses and customer address history to check the address and date_from condition.

records.question: Which customers have had an address recorded since 2013-06-14 23:07:04 and have placed orders?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_address_history.date_from >= '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
records.pred_sql: select distinct customers.customer_id from customers join customer_address_history cah on customers.customer_id = cah.customer_id join customer_orders co on customers.customer_id = co.customer_id where cah.date_from >= '2013-06-14 23:07:04' limit 5
records.thought: Select customers who have address history records with date_from on or after the given date and who have placed orders by joining Customer_Address_History and Customer_Orders tables.

records.question: Which customers named Sterling with customer number 553 use Credit Card payments, have an address from 2011-11-02 17:31:41, and placed orders on or after 1985-01-03 05:22:09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card' AND customers.customer_number = '553' AND customer_address_history.date_from = '2011-11-02 17:31:41' AND customers.customer_name = 'Sterling' AND customer_orders.order_date >= '1985-01-03 05:22:09'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join customer_address_history on customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id join customer_orders on customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id where lower(customers.customer_name) like '%sterling%' and customers.customer_number = '553' and lower(customers.payment_method_code) like '%credit card%' and customer_address_history.date_from <= '2011-11-02 17:31:41' and customer_address_history.date_to >= '2011-11-02 17:31:41' and customer_orders.order_date >= '1985-01-03 05:22:09' limit 5
records.thought: Filter customers by name 'Sterling' and customer number '553', payment method 'Credit Card', join with address history for the given date, and join with orders placed on or after the specified date.

records.question: Which customers have a customer number that is exactly 838?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.customer_number = '838'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers where customers.customer_number = '838' limit 5;
records.thought: The query filters customers by an exact match on the customer_number field with value '838'.

records.question: Who are the customers with customer_number 838 and address 058 Ben Street Apt. 034, whose phone is 009-136-4509x19635, payment method is Direct Debit, who placed completed orders on or before 1979-03-29 02:47:13, and whose address history spans from 2013-06-14 23:07:04 to at least 2018-03-16 14:49:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_phone = '009-136-4509x19635' AND customer_orders.order_date <= '1979-03-29 02:47:13' AND customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Completed' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND customer_address_history.date_to >= '2018-03-16 14:49:28' AND customers.customer_number = '838' AND customers.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034' AND customer_address_history.date_from = '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
records.pred_sql:
select customers.customer_id
from customers
join customer_orders on customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
join customer_address_history on customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
join addresses on customer_address_history.address_id = addresses.address_id
where customers.customer_number = '838'
  and lower(customers.customer_phone) like '%009-136-4509x19635%'
  and lower(customers.payment_method_code) like '%direct debit%'
  and customer_orders.order_status_code = 'completed'
  and customer_orders.order_date <= '1979-03-29 02:47:13'
  and lower(addresses.line_1_number_building) like '%058 ben street apt. 034%'
  and customer_address_history.date_from <= '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
  and (customer_address_history.date_to is null or customer_address_history.date_to >= '2018-03-16 14:49:28')
limit 5
records.thought: Filter customers by customer_number, phone, payment method, join with orders to check completed orders on or before the date, join with address history and addresses to filter by address and date range.

records.question: Which customers have the phone number (192)144-4687, customer number 951, and use Credit Card as their payment method?

SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.customer_phone = '(192)144-4687' AND customers.customer_number = '951' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers where lower(customers.customer_phone) like '%(192)144-4687%' and customers.customer_number = '951' and lower(customers.payment_method_code) = 'credit card' limit 5;

records.question: What customers have the email vandervort.helena@example.org and have orders with a status code exactly equal to Part?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'vandervort.helena@example.org' AND customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Part'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join customer_orders on customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id where lower(customers.customer_email) = 'vandervort.helena@example.org' and customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Part' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter customers by the exact email and join with orders to check for order_status_code equal to 'Part'.

records.question: Who are the customers with address histories dated on or after 2018-03-11 21:40:52?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_address_history.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE customer_address_history.date_to >= '2018-03-11 21:40:52'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join customer_address_history on customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id where customer_address_history.date_from >= '2018-03-11 21:40:52' limit 5;
records.thought: To find customers with address histories dated on or after the specified date, join Customers with Customer_Address_History and filter by date_from >= '2018-03-11 21:40:52'.

records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers where lower(customer_name) like '%madaline%' and customer_phone = '097-514-4641' and customer_number = '586' limit 5;
